PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-25-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections and the matter being properly noticed, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated April 20, 2012 is admitted to probate. William Shaw is appointed as the Administrator with will annexed with full authority. Bond is set at $286,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 31, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee. If a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-23-2021 Continued To May-25-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ritzi Lam appeared by zoom for William Shaw (Petitioner).

The Court asked about status of transferring of the original will from Contra Costa County. Ms. Lam stated that she submitted an ex parte petition to transfer the will over a month ago, that she is still looking into the status of it and that it might be wise to have a 60-day continuance. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed is continued to May 25, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-16-2021 Continued To Mar-23-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ritzi Lam appeared by zoom for William Shaw (Petitioner).

Ms. Lam stated that they checked with Valerie Ching, that they were informed that the prior Attorney had previously lodged the wills in Contra Costa County, that the will that the Court has is not the original will and that the transfer process of the will is done by ex parte. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed is continued to March 23, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
